message:
Command `PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
echo "=== ip/ structure ==="
ls -la "$PROJECT_ROOT/ip/"
echo ""
echo "=== NC_LIB_ROOT env ==="
echo "NC_LIB_ROOT=$NC_LIB_ROOT"
ls "$NC_LIB_ROOT/" 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo ""
echo "=== PDK_ROOT ==="
echo "PDK_ROOT=$PDK_ROOT"
ls "$PDK_ROOT/" 2>/dev/null | head -10` executed with exit code 0.
